title: Book Of Nonsense Limerick 8.
content:
There was an Old Man with a gong,
    Who bumped at it all the day long;
    But they called out, "O law!
    You're a horrid old bore!"
    So they smashed that Old Man with a gong.
meaning:
Edward Lear's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Book Of Nonsense Limerick 8."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
